title: carex multifolia var. multifolia
intro: Carex multifolia var. multifolia, also known as the Japanese sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex multifolia var. multifolia include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
